summary.en: Grenada's electrical environment follows a UK/IEC legacy rather than an Americas J1772-first charging ecosystem. For EV charger planning, the appropriate IEC direction is IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 for DC fast charging. This is a project and interoperability expectation rather than evidence of a mature national charger network, because Grenada's EV market is still essentially non-existent or very early-stage. Exporters should not assume SAE J1772 / CCS1 merely because Grenada is in the Caribbean; the specified direction for this market is IEC Type 2 / CCS2.
summary.zh: 格林纳达电气环境沿袭英国/IEC体系，而不是以美洲J1772为优先的充电生态。电动汽车充电桩规划中，适当的IEC方向是交流IEC 62196-2 Type 2和直流快充IEC 62196-3 CCS2。这是项目和互操作预期，并不表示该国已有成熟全国充电网络，因为格林纳达电动汽车市场仍基本不存在或处于极早期。出口商不应仅因格林纳达位于加勒比地区就假定采用SAE J1772 / CCS1；本市场指定方向为IEC Type 2 / CCS2。
summary.zht: 格瑞那達電氣環境沿襲英國/IEC體系，而不是以美洲J1772為優先的充電生態。電動汽車充電樁規劃中，適當的IEC方向是交流IEC 62196-2 Type 2和直流快充IEC 62196-3 CCS2。這是項目和互操作預期，並不表示該國已有成熟全國充電網絡，因為格瑞那達電動汽車市場仍基本不存在或處於極早期。出口商不應僅因格瑞那達位於加勒比地區就假定採用SAE J1772 / CCS1；本市場指定方向為IEC Type 2 / CCS2。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 - AC vehicle couplers, Type 2 ecosystem
IEC 62196-3 - DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, CCS2 ecosystem
IEC 61851-1 - Electric vehicle conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23 - DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and DC connector systems are not plug-compatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2. China DC chargers also commonly rely on GB/T 27930 CAN communication, which is not the CCS2 communication stack expected for IEC deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口体系与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2不能插接兼容。中国直流充电桩还通常依赖GB/T 27930 CAN通信，该通信不是IEC部署所预期的CCS2通信栈。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口體系與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2不能插接兼容。中國直流充電樁還通常依賴GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，該通訊不是IEC部署所預期的CCS2通訊棧。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 - DC charger to BMS communication

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Grenada's IEC Type 2 / CCS2 direction. Conversion requires coupler and cable-set redesign, proximity and control-pilot changes, locking and temperature-rise evidence, CCS2 DC communication firmware, labels, spare parts, and project documentation. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for a compliant Type 2 / CCS2 charger design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于格林纳达IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向。转换需要重新设计耦合器和线缆组件、接近导引和控制导引、锁止和温升证据、CCS2直流通信固件、标签、备件及项目文件。转接器不应被视为合规Type 2 / CCS2充电桩设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於格瑞那達IEC Type 2 / CCS2方向。轉換需要重新設計耦合器和線纜組件、接近導引和控制導引、鎖止和溫升證據、CCS2直流通訊固件、標籤、備件及項目文件。轉接器不應被視為合規Type 2 / CCS2充電樁設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project, utility, fleet buyer, hotel, resort, or charge-point operator specifies IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2; GB/T hardware is physically incompatible with that requirement
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Grenada as an IEC Type 2 / CCS2 market direction, not an Americas J1772 / CCS1 default. GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication require hardware and firmware redesign before IEC deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将格林纳达视为IEC Type 2 / CCS2市场方向，而不是默认美洲J1772 / CCS1。GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信在IEC部署前需要硬件和固件重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將格瑞那達視為IEC Type 2 / CCS2市場方向，而不是默認美洲J1772 / CCS1。GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊在IEC部署前需要硬件和固件重新設計。
